_purpose: Self-updating maintenance procedure for the Higgins Decomposition repository. Any AI assistant or human contributor reads this to understand what needs checking and when.

site_boundary.this_repository: Mathematical fixture — the proven, validated, stable instrument
goes_elsewhere: Anything that USES Hˢ without extending the mathematics
site_boundary.applications_site: To be created — the Hˢ applications development repository
site_boundary.rule: If it extends the math or validates the instrument, it belongs here. If it applies the instrument to a specific use case, it belongs in the applications site.

update_triggers: Any file added to or removed from the directory
Any pipeline file added or removed
Any document added to docs/ or papers/
readme_files.update_procedure: Read the affected README, add or update the entry for the new/changed file, verify all links still resolve, update file counts if mentioned.

link_freshness.procedure: For each README.md, extract all relative links ([text](path)), verify each target file exists. Report broken links before pushing.
link_freshness.automated_check: find . -name 'README.md' -exec grep -oP '\(([^)]+)\)' {} + | while read link; do test -e "$link" || echo "BROKEN: $link"; done

retired_terms.HUF: Replace with Hˢ in display text; preserve in Python identifiers for API compatibility
retired_terms.CIP: Replace with HVLD in active references; preserve in historical/lineage context
retired_terms.Unity Framework: Never use — SEO conflict with Unity game engine

governing_files_update_order.description: When making changes, update these files in this order to maintain consistency.
order: 8. Update root README.md if counts or structure changed

steps: Verify all file counts match reality
Verify all README links resolve to existing files
Verify naming convention compliance on new files
Verify PREPARE_FOR_REPO.json delta section is current
Verify HS_GITHUB_CONFIG.json push counter is incremented
Run the pipeline on at least one reference standard to confirm no regressions
Check for any leftover test/temp files
Create folder: experiments/Hs-NN_Name/
Run pipeline, save results JSON
Generate reports in all 5 languages
Add entry to experiments/README.md
Add entry to tools/README.md experiment registry
Update experiment count in root README.md
Update ai-refresh/HS_SYSTEM_INVENTORY.json
Update ai-refresh/PREPARE_FOR_REPO.json
Save HTML to tools/interactive/
Verify naming convention (Hs_ prefix or descriptive name)
Add entry to tools/interactive/README.md
Add entry to tools/README.md interactive tools table
Update interactive tool count in root README.md
Update ai-refresh/HS_MACHINE_MANIFEST.json
Update ai-refresh/HS_SYSTEM_INVENTORY.json
